title: Top Loading Washer With Activ Dual Wash And  Dit 16Kg Black Wa16J6750Svurt
features: The activ dualwash system includes a sink for a convenient place to hand-wash delicate items and pre-treat heavily soiled clothes. A water jet starts and stops at the push of a button.

Water is available at the push of a button, thanks to the water jet. The water jet dispenses water so you can pre-treat your items in the built-in sink, without the hassle of getting water from another source.

The dedicated pull-down sink provides a place for pre-treating your items so you don’t drip water everywhere carrying them from another sink. Simply soak, scrub, and drop your wet items right into the tub below.
Magic dispenser lets you wash with less worry about residual detergent. It creates a powerful water vortex that dissolves detergent and disperses it evenly before the wash cycle starts.

Wobble technology provides gentle care of fabrics without compromising washing performance. Wobble pulsators generate a dynamic, multi-directional washing flow that prevents tangles and increases washing power.

Pulling that knot of clothes out of your washing machine can be tough on you and your clothes. Wobble Technology washes your garments gently to keep them in better condition, without the stress and mess of tangles.
Magic Filter effectively gathers lint, fluff and particles from your clothes, so your laundry stays cleaner, while protecting your drain from getting clogged up. And it's easy to clean.

Keep unwelcomed speckles off your whites and darks. Magic Filter takes care of the details that make your clothes look fresh and clean, so you can look good without the worry of having to inspect and clean the little things.

Enjoy superior efficiency, less noise and a long-lasting performance. Digital Inverter Technology utilizes strong magnets for a quieter* and more powerful performance, but uses less energy than a Universal Motor. It also offers the industry’s longest durability** and warranty of 20 years***.

specifications.Option List: Power Wsah, activ dualwash(Water save, drain), Adjustable Wash,Rinse,Spin
